title: Short messages and emails
subtitle: Write simple useful messages.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use simple openings and closings.
Knowledge point 2: one clear request is better than a long message.

sections.title: Message map
rows: I am writing to you because...
I would like to know if...

items.fr: Bonjour, je vous écris parce que j’ai une question.
items.en: Hello, I am writing to you because I have a question.
items.es: Hola, le escribo porque tengo una pregunta.

items.fr: Je voudrais savoir si la chambre est disponible.
items.en: I would like to know if the room is available.
items.es: Quisiera saber si la habitación está disponible.

items.en: Can you send me the address?
Thank you in advance for your help.
items.es: Gracias de antemano por su ayuda.
